recommendedNextStage: Repository code and full release gates are ready; publish with maintainer npm credentials

releaseSurface.assessment: Supported package manifest versions, public package metadata, exact release tags, tarball/API/docs/security gates, supported workspace release-surface checks, and public npmjs exact-version availability are aligned. @stratix/tasks is frozen/deprecated and excluded from the 1.1.x release surface.

build.summary: expected to fail while @stratix/tasks remains deprecated/out of supported scope
build.reason: Deprecated @stratix/tasks still imports the removed DatabaseAPI and still calls the old BaseRepository constructor shape; tasks migration was intentionally out of scope

database-only clean breaking refactor compiles after removing DatabaseAPI and module-level connection helpers
